description: Per-acute-crisis-escalation log. G13 STRUCTURAL: mitateG5EmergencyKeywordTriggeredCid REQUIRED (cross-actor existing pattern reused from hagukumi G11 + iyashi G10). Severity enum constrains escalation routing. Encrypted envelope MANDATORY for context detail.

affectedPseudonymDid.description: 30-day rotating pseudonym DID; affected member privacy preserved

severity.description: critical-immediate-risk = immediate mitate G5 trigger + iyashi clinical surge

detectionSourceCid.description: Source attestation CID where crisis detected (peerSupportCircleAttestation / griefSupportAttestation / postnatal screening / chronic continuity record)

mitateG5EmergencyKeywordTriggeredCid.description: G13 REQUIRED: mitate G5 emergency keyword trigger CID (cross-actor existing pattern)

iyashiClinicalSurgeRequestCid.description: If clinical surge needed, iyashi.acute_first_line or temporary triage cross-link

chigiriDisputeMediationCid.description: If Council-level escalation required (rare; involuntary intervention scenarios), chigiri.disputeMediation cross-link

involuntaryInterventionAttested.description: Whether involuntary intervention was used; if true, REQUIRES Council Lv6+ ≥3 attestation chain + clinical-judgment-via-mitate licensed clinician (kokoro does NOT initiate involuntary care unilaterally)

councilLv6AttestationsForInvoluntary.description: If involuntaryInterventionAttested=true, Council Lv6+ ≥3 DIDs required

memberConsentObtainedForVoluntary.description: Whether member consent was obtained for voluntary intervention (preferred path)

encryptedContextCid.description: ADR-2605181100 encrypted envelope CID containing crisis detail context (PII; only Council + mitate + iyashi cross-actor can decrypt)
